papers.title: Improving parenting, child attachment, and externalizing behaviors: Meta-analysis of the first 25 randomized controlled trials on the effects of Video-feedback Intervention to promote Positive Parenting and Sensitive Discipline
key_findings: VIPP‑SD improves parenting behavior (r = .18), attitudes (r = .16), and child attachment security (r = .23), but not child externalizing behavior (r = .07).
Video‑feedback combined with coaching in sensitive limit‑setting is an active intervention component.

papers.title: Effects of Classroom Management Intervention Based on Teacher Training and Performance Feedback on Outcomes of Teacher-Student Dyads in Inclusive Classrooms
key_findings: Daily performance feedback increased teacher use of target classroom‑management skills (individualization, transitions, reinforcement).
Intervention raised academic engagement and positive behaviors while decreasing negative behaviors.

papers.title: Teacher coaching supported by formative assessment for improving classroom practices.
key_findings: Coaching with formative assessment significantly improved teachers’ classroom‑management practices.

papers.title: Effects of video‑feedback intervention on harmonious parent–child interaction and sensitive discipline of parents with intellectual disabilities: A randomized controlled trial
key_findings: Video‑feedback intervention improved harmonious parent–child interaction and sensitive discipline.

papers.title: Attachment‑based intervention for enhancing sensitive discipline in mothers of 1‑ to 3‑year‑old children at risk for externalizing behavior problems: A randomized controlled trial.
key_findings: VIPP‑SD improved maternal sensitive discipline and reduced child externalizing behavior.

papers.title: Improving parent–child interactions in maltreating families with the Attachment Video‑feedback Intervention: Parental childhood trauma as a moderator of treatment effects
key_findings: Attachment video‑feedback improved parent–child interactions, with treatment effects moderated by parental trauma history.

papers.title: Using Coaching to Support Teacher Implementation of Classroom‑based Interventions
key_findings: Coaching improves teacher implementation of classroom‑based interventions.

papers.title: Near‑infrared spectroscopy (NIRS) neurofeedback as a treatment for children with attention deficit hyperactivity disorder (ADHD)—a pilot study
key_findings: NIRS neurofeedback is feasible and may reduce ADHD symptoms.

papers.title: Video‑feedback Intervention to promote Positive Parenting adapted to Autism (VIPP‑AUTI): A randomized controlled trial
key_findings: VIPP‑AUTI improved parent–child interaction and reduced autism‑related symptoms.

papers.title: Further Evidence on Online Video‑Feedback Intervention: Enhancing Parent–Child Interactions and Reducing Disordered Eating in Children
key_findings: Online video‑feedback improved parent–child interactions and reduced disordered‑eating symptoms.

aggregated_techniques.target_population: parents of children with externalizing behavior

aggregated_techniques.technique: Classroom management training with performance feedback
